title: EA Repository Explorer
subtitle: Energy Company — Living Architecture Repository
description: Interactive exploration of a graph-based Enterprise Architecture repository with elements across 7 layers connected by relationships.

hero.headline: The Living Repository
hero.subline: A graph-based EA repository where every element is a node and every relationship is a first-class citizen. This is what Enterprise Architecture looks like when it becomes queryable, traversable, and agent-accessible.

elements.name: Grid Automation
